metadata.name: Multi-Agent Claims Processing and Suitability Assessment

description: Evaluates a multi-agent workflow (Claim Intaker, Suitability Auditor, Compliance Reviewer) executing a complex client dispute claim and transaction reversal, strictly gated by FINRA Rule 2111 (Suitability) and Rule 4511 (Recordkeeping).

nodes.task_description: Claim Intake Agent must capture a client's dispute claiming an unauthorized high-yield bond transaction ($150,000) that conflicts with their conservative investment profile. It must invoke 'register_client_dispute' and pass the claim details to the Suitability Auditor agent.

Suitability Auditor Agent must evaluate the disputed transaction against FINRA Rule 2111 (Suitability). It must fetch the client profile ('get_client_profile') and transaction details ('get_transaction_details'), calculate the suitability variance, flag it as 'unsuitable' if risk mismatch exceeds thresholds, and document the regulatory rationale.

Compliance Reviewer Agent must approve the reversal transaction and execute 'record_regulatory_compliance_ledger' under FINRA Rule 4511 (Recordkeeping), capturing the full audit trail of the dispute, suitability analysis, and refund authorization.
